name: tamar-resume-tailor
description: Tailor resumes for specific job applications using the Tamar AI API. Uploads a resume, matches it against a job description or URL, applies natural-language feedback, and downloads a PDF.
author: evgenyshneyderman

tamar_api_key.description: Tamar API key (obtain from https://ask-tamar.com → Profile → API Keys). Stored in ~/.tamarrc by the `tamar auth` command.
